prompt_queue.prompt: Industry: outdoors and field. Generate one distinct, buildable store concept for outdoors and field-use products. Examples of valid sub-spaces: backpacking and camping, fly-fishing, foraging and field naturalism, cyanotype and field photography kits, bird and wildlife observation, cycling and ultra-cycling, climbing or canyoneering specialty, beekeeping, gardening for harsh climates, overlanding. Stay inside outdoors and field-use; do not drift into pure apparel or pure home goods.
